questionHtml:
Which aspect of thermal physics is best explained by the molecular kinetic model?

A. The equation of state of ideal gases

B. The difference between Celsius and Kelvin temperature

C. The value of the Avogadro constant

D. The existence of gaseous isotopes

meta.title: Which aspect of thermal physics is best explained by the molecular kinetic model? A. The equation of state of ideal gases B. The difference between Celsius and Kelvin temperature C
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
